case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS KILLAM PAUL, F.

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 6/18 /03 AT 130PM "DENIED";MAILED COPIES.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-20-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT CLAIMS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
